message:
feat(server): wire BLMPOP and BZMPOP to blocking infrastructure

- Add BLmpop and BZmpop variants to BlockingOp enum
- Parse BLMPOP/BZMPOP in try_build_blocked_state: timeout from argv[1]
  (seconds as float), collect full argv for re-execution
- Fulfill by re-executing the stored command and checking for non-nil
  response (same pattern as XREAD BLOCK)
- Return Array(None) on timeout expiry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
